suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that URL-state restoration for UI fields tied to input-event validation must trigger equivalent validation logic after programmatic value assignment (e.g., dispatch input events or run a shared sync function).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-code-cleanup restored block/timestamp URL values by setting .value directly; the existing mutual-exclusivity listeners are input-event driven, so programmatic restoration can leave both fields enabled when both query params are present.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that strict test-first (TDD) sequencing may be optional for pure refactor/cleanup features when behavior is already covered by existing tests and validators still run in full.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-code-cleanup was a refactor/security-hardening cleanup validated by 223 existing tests, mypy, and ruff without adding new behavior-specific tests.
